title: Mogi das Cruzes、SP — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Mogi das Cruzes、SPの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Mogi das CruzesはSPにある人口455,523の都市です。A major city in Greater São Paulo, known for its Japanese community, orchid production, and the Serra do Itapety mountain range.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
